Container.Name: CWA-eBook-Translate
Container.Overview:
Bilingual reading for Calibre-Web-Automated: translate ebooks paragraph-by-paragraph WHILE you read, in 100+ languages, using your own local LLM (Ollama / vLLM / LM Studio - Gemma is the tuned default) or any major cloud API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek, OpenRouter...).
PROXY-INJECTION MODE (this template): the container sits in front of your existing CWA and injects the translation overlay on the fly. Your CWA container stays 100% stock - no template mounts, no modifications, survives CWA updates. Simply browse your library through THIS container's port instead of CWA's and the translator control bar appears in the ebook reader.
Features: side-by-side bilingual view, whole-chapter background prefetch, persistent translation cache (never pay for the same paragraph twice), per-IP rate limiting, provider fallback, non-root container. GPL-3.0, no telemetry, no subscription.
Container.DonateText: If this plugin saves you a translation subscription, consider supporting development
Container.Requires: A running Calibre-Web-Automated instance (reachable from this container), and an LLM backend: local (Ollama/vLLM/LM Studio) or a cloud API key.

Config.Name: Reader Port (browse CWA here)
Config.Description: Read your library through this port to get the translation overlay. Your CWA port keeps serving stock CWA.

Config.Name: CWA URL
Config.Description: URL of your Calibre-Web-Automated instance, e.g. http://YOUR-SERVER-IP:8083 (use the HOST port you mapped for CWA). Required for the overlay; leave empty for API-only mode.

Config.Name: Translation Cache
Config.Description: Holds the SQLite translation cache (translations are never re-paid).

Config.Name: LLM Provider
Config.Description: local (Ollama/vLLM/LM Studio) or: openai, anthropic, gemini, groq, together, minimax, deepseek, openrouter

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: Model name for the chosen provider. Gemma 4 is the tuned default for local use.

Config.Name: Local LLM URL
Config.Description: Only for LLM Provider=local. OpenAI-compatible endpoint - the path is always /v1/chat/completions; only host:port changes (Ollama :11434, LM Studio :1234, vLLM :8000). Use your server's IP, NOT localhost.

Config.Name: Max Upstream Inflight
Config.Description: Process-wide cap on simultaneous LLM calls (0 = unlimited). Set 2 for a single local GPU to prevent timeout cascades.

Config.Name: Batch Size
Config.Description: Paragraphs per LLM call. Higher is faster on slow local models; lower if requests time out.

Config.Name: Max Concurrent
Config.Description: Simultaneous batches per request. 1-2 is safest on a single GPU.

Config.Name: Request Timeout (s)
Config.Description: Seconds before a single translation request is abandoned.

Config.Name: Context Window
Config.Description: Surrounding paragraphs given to the LLM as do-not-translate context (0 = off; 1-2 improves literary quality, costs tokens).

Config.Name: Fallback Provider
Config.Description: Optional cloud provider used automatically when the primary fails (e.g. deepseek).

Config.Name: Fallback API Key
Config.Description: API key for the fallback provider.

Config.Name: API Token
Config.Description: Optional shared secret for the translation API (X-BT-Token). Recommended if anyone untrusted shares your network.
